html:
This article is a stub. You can help Don't Starve Wiki by expanding it.

Exclusive to:

Town Houses are naturally-spawning structures exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. They are the homes of various Pig Traders, and can be found in large numbers in pig city areas. They have several different styles that they appear in. Its Pig Trader will attempt to return to it each evening, and if it is occupied it will emit a small light that is enough to avoid Charlie. As with most structures in the Pig cities, Town Houses will be adorned with decorations while its residents are celebrating the end of an Aporkalypse. Pig Traders respawn after 3 days if killed.

The player can also craft their own Town Houses using the Key to the City and its City Planning crafting tab, using four Boards, three Cut Stone, and four Pig Skin. When crafted, the house will have a random appearance from a selection of appearances. If the player builds a My City Hall in addition to a Town House, the Pig that owns the house will periodically pay the player taxes. See My City Hall for more info.

Each town house will spawn a random Pig Trader when first built. The style of the house does not affect the Pig Trader spawned, and each outcome is equally likely. Any time that the Pig Trader who owns the house dies, another Pig Trader of the same type will respawn after three days.

Should the Town House be hammered down or burnt, then the Town House can be rebuilt with a hammer. In order to permanently destroy a Town House and regain half the spent materials, one must use the Executive Hammer.

Tips

  • If one wants to build a Pig City in a vanilla Don't Starve or Reign Of Giants world, one will need to bring the Key to the City through the Skyworthy and start by building these houses. As Werepigs are an easy source of Pig Skin, it shouldn't be long until the player has enough houses to get a healthy income from the Traders.

Gallery

  • The six styles of Town Houses.
  • The six styles of Town Houses when celebrating the Pig Fiesta.

“Both a house, and a home.”
–Wilson
“Pig houses look pretty different here.”
–Willow
“Little pig! Little pig! Let Wolfgang come in!”
–Wolfgang
“Shelter won't save you from death.”
–Wendy
“CONTAINER FOR PIGS”
–WX-78
“A more advanced version of pig domicile.”
–Wickerbottom

–Woodie

“WILBA HOME IS'T BIGGER”
–Wilba
“Twirly tail home”
–Wormwood
“As pig houses go, it's decent enough.”
–Wheeler

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Nhà Phố là những công trình kiến ​​trúc sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Chúng là nhà của nhiều Người buôn lợn khác nhau và có thể được tìm thấy với số lượng lớn ở các khu vực thành phố lợn. Chúng có nhiều phong cách khác nhau mà chúng xuất hiện. Người buôn lợn của nó sẽ cố gắng quay lại nó vào mỗi buổi tối và nếu nó bị chiếm giữ, nó sẽ phát ra một ánh sáng nhỏ đủ để tránh Charlie. Giống như hầu hết các công trình kiến ​​trúc ở các thành phố Lợn, Nhà Phố sẽ được trang trí bằng đồ trang trí trong khi cư dân của nó đang ăn mừng sự kết thúc của Ngày tận thế. Thương Nhân Lợn sẽ hồi sinh sau 3 ngày nếu bị giết.

'''Town Houses''' are naturally-spawning structures exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC. They are the homes of various [[Pig Traders]], and can be found in large numbers in pig city areas. They have several different styles that they appear in. Its Pig Trader will attempt to return to it each evening, and if it is occupied it will emit a small light that is enough to avoid [[Grue|Charlie]]. As with most structures in the Pig cities, Town Houses will be adorned with decorations while its residents are celebrating the end of an [[Aporkalypse]]. Pig Traders respawn after 3 [[Day|days]] if killed.

The player can also craft their own Town Houses using the [[Key to the City]] and its [[City Planning]] crafting tab, using four [[Boards]], three [[Cut Stone]], and four [[Pig Skin]]. When crafted, the house will have a random appearance from a selection of appearances. If the player builds a [[My City Hall]] in addition to a Town House, the Pig that owns the house will periodically pay the player taxes. See My City Hall for more info.

Each town house will spawn a random Pig Trader when first built. The style of the house does not affect the Pig Trader spawned, and each outcome is equally likely. Any time that the Pig Trader who owns the house dies, another Pig Trader of the same type will respawn after three days.

Should the Town House be hammered down or burnt, then the Town House can be rebuilt with a hammer. In order to permanently destroy a Town House and regain half the spent materials, one must use the [[Executive Hammer]].

== {{Pic32|Prototype}}Tips ==

* If one wants to build a Pig City in a vanilla ''Don't Starve'' or ''Reign Of Giants'' world, one will need to bring the Key to the City through the [[Skyworthy]] and start by building these houses. As [[Werepig]]s are an easy source of Pig Skin, it shouldn't be long until the player has enough houses to get a healthy income from the Traders.
